title: jasminum tomentosum var. somaliense
intro: Jasminum tomentosum var. somaliense, also known as Somali Jasmine or Jasmine of the Somali Desert, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jasminum tomentosum var. somaliense include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
